description: Services that let you run Claude Code CLI and OpenAI Codex CLI for free or at significantly reduced cost by proxying API calls through alternative endpoints.

tools.name: aerolink.lat
tools.description: Unified API gateway designed for AI agents — one key for Claude, GPT, Gemini, and DeepSeek with $350+ free credits on signup. INR pricing makes it very affordable for Indian developers.

free_tier_limits.notes: Legitimate reseller with rolling usage limits. INR pricing available (₹449/mo Starter). Plans: $5 Starter → $200 Power. Primarily targets Indian developers. Contact via Telegram @aerolinkk for support.

tools.notes: Legitimate API reseller — operates within Anthropic/OpenAI reseller agreements. $350+ free credits make it one of the most generous free tiers for Claude Code. Pricing in both USD and INR. Contact via Telegram @aerolinkk.

tools.name: Agent Router
tools.description: Unified LLM API gateway routing to OpenAI, Anthropic, DeepSeek, Zhipu GLM, and Moonshot via a single OpenAI/Anthropic-compatible endpoint. $200 free credits on signup.
tools.claude_code_setup: Set ANTHROPIC_BASE_URL=https://pro.agentrouter.org and use your AgentRouter API key

free_tier_limits.free_credits: $1 welcome bonus (~800K input tokens on deepseek-chat or ~66K on gpt-4o)
free_tier_limits.notes: No ongoing free tier after bonus. Top-up via admin contact. Auto-routes by model name prefix (gpt-* → OpenAI, claude-* → Anthropic). Wallet-based billing.

tools.notes: YC W25 startup. Also at agentrouter.to for broader agent API routing across 17+ domains. Supports both OpenAI /v1/chat/completions and Anthropic Messages API formats. Wallet-based billing — top up to continue after $1 bonus.

tools.name: iyh.app
tools.description: Integrated Yotta Hub — 500K free tokens (never expire) for Claude Opus 4.8, GPT-5.5, and Gemini via a single OpenAI-compatible endpoint. Has explicit setup guides for Claude Code and Codex CLI.

free_tier_limits.notes: 500K free tokens never expire — good for light Claude Code sessions. Token multiplier: 1x (base models) to 4x (Opus). Supports USD and IDR pricing. Has Discord community and explicit Claude Code / Codex CLI setup guides.

tools.notes: Indonesian-based reseller. 500K free forever tokens is genuinely useful for Claude Code. Has explicit guides for Claude Code, Codex CLI, and OpenCode. Discord community for support.

tools.name: api.hcrsec.cn
tools.description: Chinese AI API proxy offering free and low-cost access to Claude, GPT, and Gemini via OpenAI-compatible endpoint. Popular in Chinese developer communities for running Claude Code at near-zero cost.

free_tier_limits.free_credits: Free quota on signup — check dashboard for current amount
free_tier_limits.notes: ⚠️ UNOFFICIAL THIRD-PARTY PROXY: Your prompts and code route through servers in China. Not affiliated with Anthropic or OpenAI. Use only for non-sensitive projects. Community-verified working as of June 2026.

tools.notes: ⚠️ Unofficial third-party proxy. Your prompts, code, and API keys pass through third-party Chinese servers — do NOT use for sensitive or proprietary code. For hobby/learning use only. Community reports it as working and low-cost. Pricing in CNY.

tools.name: tokenlb.net
tools.description: Chinese LLM API gateway with load-balanced access to Claude, GPT-4o, Gemini, DeepSeek, Qwen, and Llama. Single prepaid key, OpenAI-compatible — used by developers for low-cost Claude Code proxying.

free_tier_limits.notes: ⚠️ UNOFFICIAL THIRD-PARTY PROXY: Requests route through third-party infrastructure in China. Not affiliated with Anthropic or OpenAI. Prepaid top-up after trial. Very cheap vs direct API. Use only for non-sensitive code.

tools.notes: ⚠️ Unofficial third-party proxy. Your API traffic routes through third-party Chinese servers — do NOT use for sensitive or proprietary code. Prepaid model: top up balance to continue. Significantly cheaper than direct API. New domain with limited community reputation.
